summary: Session 2 of 5: wired the Copilot seat-profile happy path. New src/utils/copilotSeatSetup.ts (VS Code-free core): auto-derived seat identity (seat-id = sha256(hostname|username)[:12], seat-label = workspace basename, zero typing per critique C1); cancellable catalog-refresh runner with pre-run lockfile snapshot restored on every non-completed path (cancel / teardown / spawn error / non-zero exit), teardown re-restore from the close event, completed-run-wins-over-late-cancel, and a bounded post-kill force-settle; success decided ONLY by parsing the CLI's stdout summary line (exit code never trusted, pinned M5 contract); transport.profile written as an anchored DIRECT-CHILD field replacement in the transport: block (fail-loud on missing anchor / operator-edited value, never an append; nested-profile locator hole from the cross-verifier fixed); readTransportProfile wired as the durable transportProfileSeed source. gitScaffold.ts: pure sequencing gate decideCopilotSeatSetup consuming the completed scaffold's installOk+venvPath, seat setup awaited strictly after the scaffold step through the scaffolded venv's own interpreter (venvPython(installOutcome.venvPath)), cancellable INDETERMINATE notification (determinate not parseable - the CLI emits no per-model output; m2 fallback recorded), win32 taskkill /T tree-kill, subscriptions splice hygiene, honest per-outcome messaging with a copy-pasteable re-run hint. transportProfile rider threaded webview -> protocol -> fail-loud narrowing -> build handler (Full-only). 72 new Layer-2 tests (1206 total passing); real live-seat dogfood SUCCESS (102s, 15/18 models, providers anthropic+google+openai, config + lockfile written). Suites: tsc/eslint clean, pytest 2483/5 skipped, Playwright 19 passed re-run after final dist rebuild.
verification_notes: Routed gate REQUIRED (blast-radius, multi-module, breadth). Session verification on gpt-5-4 (OpenAI, cross-provider from the Claude orchestrator): round 1 ISSUES_FOUND (1 Major, ledger id S2-V-001: gitScaffold integration wiring unpinned by Layer-2 tests); round 2 held S2-V-001 partially-fixed (helpers pinned, the real buildProjectStructureNoPrompt path still unexercised); round 3 VERIFIED after BuildStructureSeams let the suite drive the REAL build path (ordering, venvPath threading, skip branches). Single ledger id across rounds per the Set 071 discipline. Earlier routed code-review (opus -> gpt-5-4 auto-verify) produced 2 Majors (teardown-restore race, late-cancel-after-completed race) + 1 cross-verifier Major (nested-profile locator) - all fixed in-session with pinning tests. sN-issues artifacts: s2-issues.json, s2-issues-round-2.json.

reason.specifics: Session 3 implements the honest failure UX (critique C3) and the full failure matrix over the exact wrapper this session built - continuity with the S2 outcome states (refresh-failed / insufficient-providers / config-write-failed / cancelled) and the named residuals (atomic config write, POSIX tree-kill) makes the same engine at high effort the natural pickup, matching the ai-assignment recommendation.
